reviews.author: AKR
reviews.review_body:
Hi everyone, 

My child joined WORLD ONE SCHOOL as a curious, happy child who loved learning, exploring and asking questions. He was active, well-mannered and eager to go to school.
But after coming here, his interest has dropped drastically. The spark, creativity and excitement he once had is almost gone.

Teaching quality is extremely disappointing. Children are forced to mug up whatever is written on the board — no concepts, no real explanation, no interactive learning. This school is running an outdated rote-learning system while pretending to be “modern”. It feels like a copy-paste learning factory, not a school.

A Grade 1 child being slightly playful is normal. Instead of understanding kids, teachers silence them with stern behavior and pressure. They are suppressing children’s confidence and natural childhood energy, not shaping it.

And for what?
You charge around ₹1.8 lakh per student — that’s more than ₹50+ lakhs from one class — but the teaching standards are worse than many local budget schools. We are paying for education, not for your real-estate growth while you continue “developing the campus”.

The glossy advertising and tour may look impressive, but it’s just a distraction. More than half the campus is still incomplete. Instead of investing in genuine learning, you focus on appearances. If you spent even half the marketing effort on teacher training, results would be very different.

Parents are paying premium fees for quality teaching and child development, not for buildings, posters, and promises. Right now, the school is failing children — academically, emotionally, and creatively.

A school should build a child’s future. Here, sadly, it feels like creativity is crushed and curiosity is lost.

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
This school is good for nothing, complete waste of Money and Time.
They don't have proper infrastructure and no skilled/experienced teachers.
Using School ground for commercial activities, its more like a cricket academy than a school.
Even working days also they are renting playground for outsiders and somtimes these outsiders are  boozing in the school premise (Play ground).  

Campus of 33 acres is very tempting but they are not even using 10% of it for student facilities and play activities rather than commercial.

Teaching facility were changing every year, every academic year fresh teaching faculty.
This is the first school we have seen 99% attrition of faculty, but they were increasing 
fee by 15-20% every academic year.

We have lot of trust and hopes on Vignan brand and Rattaiah's vision but you don't find both in this school. Greedy Management, even they are  failed in providing basic facilities to Students. (Poor classroom infrastructue, broken chairs, unclean drinking water and unhygine toilets and many more).

Kids are studying in Eglish Medium, even higher grade students can't read and write proper english.
Managment should look into this matters on serious note; please do good business and work towards bright future of kids and do justification for the fee paid. 

Final word: We are loosing money but no peace of mind.

reviews.author: Anirudh Putta
reviews.review_body: Not so good, better check for other schools

reviews.author: MANISH KUMAR
reviews.review_body:
It is one of the CBSE International School in India.

Follows CBSE International syllabus, which encourages concept based learning and stress on comprehensive practical development of student.

Upto class 10th level (secondary education) only.

reviews.author: Sherein Dias
reviews.review_body: I have been to this school for a interview... It's a very beautiful place..however I was given a question paper with 15 questions ,answer sheets a writing pad and a pen and was asked to complete the paper in an hour.. I was like what ? I came here to give my interview as a teacher not as a student.. and they asked me submit my mobile before I start writing...really... If you really want to know how much knowledge a person who is coming for a interview has please test them during the demo .The receptionist didn't have any answer to my questions Anyways good luck to the people working here.

reviews.author: vijay ms
reviews.review_body:
Honest review. No response on call and WhatsApp also . I week has completed. Waiting for the next round. I don't know who is the Admin manager.i don't know who is hr manager. Are they sleeping. I came on Wednesday to school. When i went inside she told this Wait till Monday .
Are they sleeping... Whole department.😐😶 😵
